seed_instruction: Write a thank you email to a professor after a successful internship program.
org_constraint: The email must include the keyword "gratitude" at least once.
new_constraint: Avoid using the keyword "gratitude" in the email.
instruction: Write a thank you email to a professor after a successful internship program. The email must include the keyword "gratitude" at least once. Avoid using the keyword "gratitude" in the email.
response:
Subject: Thank You - Successful Internship Experience

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I am writing to express my sincere thanks as my internship program has successfully concluded. I wanted to take a moment to let you know how much I valued this opportunity under your guidance.

The experience has been incredibly rewarding. The projects I worked on, particularly [mention a specific project or area of work], allowed me to apply concepts from [mention a specific course or field] in a very real-world setting. Your mentorship made a huge difference in my professional development; your insights on [mention a specific skill or piece of advice they gave] were particularly helpful.

I feel significantly more prepared for my future academic and career endeavors because of the knowledge and support I received during this internship. I deeply appreciate you taking the time to supervise me and for believing in my potential.

Thank you again for providing me with such a valuable learning experience. I hope to stay in touch and look forward to the possibility of connecting with you again in the future.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Student ID or Contact Information]<turn|>
